title: corunastylis mollissima
intro: Corunastylis mollissima, also known as the Mollis Corunastylis or Velvet Lip Orchid, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations and infections. Corunastylis mollissima is often used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
